title: FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTION - 211info
text: BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home parenting education that focuse on child development, age-appropriate behavior, parent-child interaction, positive discipline, family health and safety, parenting outreach services, and diapers. 207 NE Park Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Must have a dependent in the home under 18 years of age Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm, Friday 8am-noon Email (541) 426-9411 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 426-9411 Maria Weer Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Can self-refer or be referred to program by an ODHS self-sufficiency coach FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ODHS Referral Form LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Baker, Union, and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm, Friday 8am-noon Services: Diapers Family Support Centers/Outreach Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HARVEST SHARE MATERIAL GOODS - BABY RESOURCES PUBLIC SAFETY - CAR SEAT PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MINI MOUNTAINEERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES
